documentation.content: The synthetic HTTPS check on the frontend root path is failing from multiple regions. Frontend is stateless Next.js behind Cloud Run — if this fires in isolation, check the Cloud Run revision health, domain mapping, and CDN. Paired with backend-uptime-failure it's almost certainly DNS/LB. Metric source: monitoring.googleapis.com/uptime_check/check_passed on the frontend uptime check.

conditions.displayName: Uptime check failing from 2+ regions for 5m
